wikitext.*:
[[File:BlueWiki.png|480x480px|thumb]] '''Blue''', also known as '''Thought''', is the color of logic, order, and structure. Blue is well known for its variety of controlling effects, especially locks. Favoring denial over sheer force and power, Blue can deal with any type of deck with its tricks and traps, no matter how fast they go or how powerful the enemy fighters are. :'''Pros:''' :* Numerous tricks and traps; locks,swaps,and power debuffs. :* Can provide an answer fast; provided with controlling factors at a cheap cost. :* Provided with various methods of inexpensive draw. :* Huge amounts of health on its walls. :'''Cons:''' :* Hard to obtain fast stud generation,worst ramp. :* Most elaborate methods of removals. :* No effects that decrease enemy fighters' health or the opponent's life directly. :* Really passive effects without any offensive capabilities. {{clear}}
